error_anchors_before: [W513 10:05:04.650796420 compiler_depend.ts:577] Warning: NPU warning, error code is 507035[Error]: | [Error]: The vector core execution is abnormal. | EH9999: Inner Error! | rtDeviceSynchronizeWithTimeout execute failed, reason=[vector core exception][FUN
natural_language: When an NPU vector core exception (error code 507035) occurs due to missing temporary buffer for Tanh, do not omit allocation of a temporary queue; instead declare a `VECCALC` queue `tmpQueue_` and allocate/free a temporary tensor during `Compute`.
